figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overview of the proposed pipeline. A shared MLP improves the initial node features, after which a shared GATv2 encoder produces structure-aware embeddings for both the A-graph (derived from BIM) and the S-graph (built online from LiDAR SLAM). A dot-product affinity matrix is computed, normalized via Sinkhorn with dummy-column padding to handle partial observations, and decoded into a hard one-to-one correspondence by the Hungarian algorithm.
